docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $911.79 FILED BY G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAMARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
